name: ga4-mcp
description: Connect your Google Analytics 4 data to Claude (read-only). Packages the official Google Analytics MCP server. REQUIRES Python 3.10+ and pipx on your machine — see README. | [ES] Conectá tu Google Analytics 4 a Claude (solo lectura). Empaqueta el MCP oficial de Google. REQUIERE Python 3.10+ y pipx — ver README.
long_description:
This is a Claude Desktop extension that runs the official Google Analytics MCP server (github.com/googleanalytics/google-analytics-mcp, PyPI package 'analytics-mcp'), maintained by the Google Analytics team. It gives Claude read-only access to your GA4 accounts and properties via the Analytics Admin & Data APIs: account/property discovery, core reports, funnel reports, realtime reports, and custom dimensions/metrics.

PREREQUISITES (the extension cannot bundle these): (1) Python 3.10 or newer, (2) pipx on your PATH, (3) the Google Analytics Admin API and Data API enabled in a Google Cloud project, and (4) credentials with the analytics.readonly scope — either a Service Account JSON key (simplest) or user credentials from `gcloud auth application-default login`. Fill in the path to that credentials file and your Google Cloud Project ID below. Full step-by-step setup is in the README: https://github.com/Leanpicazoo/ga4-mcp

tools.name: get_account_summaries
tools.description: List the user's Google Analytics accounts and properties.

tools.name: get_property_details
tools.description: Return details about a specific GA4 property.

tools.name: list_google_ads_links
tools.description: List Google Ads account links for a property.

tools.name: list_property_annotations
tools.description: List annotations configured for a property.

tools.name: get_custom_dimensions_and_metrics
tools.description: List the custom dimensions and metrics configured for a property.

tools.name: run_report
tools.description: Run a core GA4 report (Data API): metrics, dimensions, date ranges, filters.

tools.name: run_realtime_report
tools.description: Run a GA4 realtime report (last 30 minutes).

tools.name: run_funnel_report
tools.description: Run a GA4 funnel report (Data API).

tools.name: run_conversions_report
tools.description: Run a GA4 conversions report (Data API).

google_credentials_file.title: Credentials file (Service Account JSON or ADC)
google_credentials_file.description: Path to your Google credentials JSON with the analytics.readonly scope. Easiest: a Service Account key file. Alternative: the ADC file created by `gcloud auth application-default login` (printed as 'Credentials saved to file: ...'). The associated identity must have access to your GA4 property.

google_project_id.title: Google Cloud Project ID
google_project_id.description: The Project ID where you enabled the Google Analytics Admin API and Data API (e.g. my-project-123456).
